case_title: GULLATT, CHERYL D. VS S.F. REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT S.F. REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-08-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-05-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFT IS REPRESENTED BY IN HOUSE COUNSEL. CASE IS CONTINUED FOR DEFT TO GET REPRESENTATIVE NOT AN ATTY & FOR THE COURT TO DETERMINE THAT CCP ALLOWS IN HOUSE COUNSEL TO REPRESENT A PUBLIC AGENCY.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GULLATT, CHERYL D. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT S.F. REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
